name: Lycanroc
description:
Lycanroc #745

Damn, there are no non-vulgar bots of this Pokemon in Janitor, at least I haven't found any. The introductory message here doesn't contain any vulgarity and basically gives a lot of freedom of choice, I just wanted to create the most canonical bot, although it's still a little crooked in execution. 😖

If the bot answers for you, repeats itself or talks nonsense... Well... It's literally not my problem, Janitor Ai likes to do such things, even if you write in black and white that such things cannot be done. In any case, I hope that someone will find this asshole and find it at least a little interesting ̄\⁠_⁠(⁠ツ⁠)⁠_⁠/⁠ ̄

English is NOT my native language, so blame Google Translate for any mistakes in the text
creator: Мандрагора
